laws.title: Public Law 4-36 | Defense Heraldic Services Act
laws.chronology_conclusion: This is a current direct amendment package that reserves section 7594 and inserts new section 206, with a corresponding TOC update.
exact_enacted_text_or_amendment_command: Insert the title 10 TOC item for 206 after /us/usc/t10/s205.
source_evidence: codification/plans/applied/PL-004-036.json approves reserving 7594 and inserting section 206 with a TOC item.
codification/decisions/PL-004-036.md explains that section II repeals 10 U.S.C. 7594 and section III creates 10 U.S.C. 206.
audit/primary/batch-02.json classifies PL-004-036 as a direct code amendment at Title 10.
laws.current_xml_comparison: The current branch is inconsistent: 10 U.S.C. 206 is present, but 10 U.S.C. 7594 is still operative; origin/main already reflects the reserved-7594 plus section-206 pattern.
laws.final_recommended_action: Align the branch with the approved plan by reserving 7594 and keeping the 206 insertion and TOC update.
